def evaluate(board):
    """Weighted evaluation."""
    return (
        -0.850 * aggregate_height(board)
      + +1.000 * complete_lines(board)
      + -3.800 * holes(board)
      + -1.000 * bumpiness(board)
      + -0.200 * well_depth(board)
      + +0.100 * tetris_readiness(board)
      + -0.050 * column_transitions(board)
      + -0.120 * row_transitions(board)
    )

      + -0.200 * well_depth(board)
      + +0.100 * tetris_readiness(board)
      + -0.050 * column_transitions(board)
      + -0.120 * row_transitions(board)
